title: Sphaeropteris pukuana
taxonomy: Sphaeropteris pukuana is a species of tree fern in the family Cyatheaceae. It belongs to the order Cyatheales, which is a group of ancient and relictual ferns. The genus Sphaeropteris is part of the family Cyatheaceae, commonly known as the tree fern family. Sphaeropteris pukuana is native to the tropical regions of Africa. Its classification is based on the combination of morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis.
